description: Product Description Previous page Next page 1 All Around Wipes 2 Effortless Cleaning Versatile Solutions for Every Surface Buzz Lemon Scented Wipes Add To Basket 200pk Buzz Bathroom Wipes Add To Basket 30pk All Floor Wipes Appl Add To Basket 200pk Buzz Wipes Rhubarb Add To Basket 100pk Car Dash Wipes Add To Basket Customer Reviews 4.2 out of 5 stars 102 4.3 out of 5 stars 88 4.0 out of 5 stars 159 4.4 out of 5 stars 93 4.3 out of 5 stars 604 Price £8.65 £ 8 . 65 £9.65 £ 9 . 65 £7.62 £ 7 . 62 £9.50 £ 9 . 50 £7.99 £ 7 . 99 Versatile Use ✔ ✔ ✔ ✔ ✔ Eliminate Dirt ✔ ✔ ✔ ✔ ✔ Scented ✔ ✔ ✔ ✔ ✔ Convenient Use ✔ ✔ ✔ ✔ ✔ Multipack ✔ ✔ ✔ ✔ ✔ Are Buzz Wipes safe to use on kitchen surfaces? Yes, Buzz Antibacterial Wipes are effective for kitchen surfaces, including counters. They are ideal for cleaning food preparation areas, removing dirt and grime for a fresh and hygienic finish. How do Buzz Wipes compare in size to other wipes? Buzz Wipes are 40% bigger than standard wipes, providing more coverage and value. Each wipe measures 18cm x 19cm, making it easier to clean larger areas quickly and efficiently. Do these wipes leave a residue after use? No, Buzz Wipes are moisture-rich but do not leave any sticky residue. They are designed to provide a clean, fresh surface without the need for rinsing. How effective are Buzz Wipes in everyday cleaning? Buzz Wipes are highly effective in everyday cleaning, designed to eliminate 99.9% of harmful microorganisms on various surfaces, ensuring a thorough and hygienic clean. How do I keep Buzz Wipes fresh after opening? The resealable opening on Buzz Wipes ensures they stay fresh and ready for your next cleaning task. Simply seal the pack after each use to maintain moisture and effectiveness.
